_meta.note: agno uses useFrontendTool (Strategy B) for HITL — produces frontend-tool-call shapes, not LangGraph interrupt() events. Same tool shape as gen-ui-interrupt but consumed by useHeadlessInterrupt on the frontend.

fixtures._comment: interrupt-headless sales-call pill — first leg: schedule_meeting frontend tool call. The probe asserts interrupt-headless-popup testid mounts in the app surface pane.

match.userMessage: intro call with the sales team

response.content: Sure — let me check available times.

fixtures._comment: interrupt-headless sales-call pill — second leg: confirmation after user picks a slot.

match.userMessage: intro call with the sales team

response.content: Booked: Sales intro call confirmed for the slot you picked.

fixtures._comment: interrupt-headless alice-1on1 pill — first leg: schedule_meeting frontend tool call.

response.content: Got it — pulling up next-week slots.

fixtures._comment: interrupt-headless alice-1on1 pill — second leg: confirmation after user picks a slot.

response.content: Scheduled: 1:1 with Alice locked in for the slot you picked.
